warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
notes: Baseline OK (guest, not logged in). Opened perplexity.ai, hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), closed login modal, typed PII prompt into composer and clicked 제출. Page navigated to a /search thread (perplexity.ai/search/05d630a6-...). After ~60s the answer area rendered the APF block warning: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' (Request with sensitive info blocked by security policy). A '죄송합니다. 연결이 끊어졌습니다 / 다시 시도' (connection lost / retry) banner followed, the expected post-intercept termination. The 차단 key-validator warning rendered correctly — APF engine intercept fired and injected the block frame. W5.4 perplexity migration confirmed NO REGRESSION. Verified via vision screenshot (CDP debug port did not enumerate this Chrome window; GUI snapshot+screenshot used).
